The Standard

Where craft
becomes standard.

Located in the heart of El Segundo, I bring five years of dedication to barbering. I specialize in all variations of fade and blend work, detailed beard work, and precision shear cutting.

Every appointment begins with a consultation. Understanding your hair, texture, and lifestyle allows me to deliver consistent results — every single time.

This is not a rushed service. It's a refined experience built on skill, focus, and consistency.
